title: Xiang Yundong
content:
Xiang Yundong
 is one of the 
Allheaven Star System
's strongest cultivators and amongst those that have reached infinitely close to the Third Step.

Appearance
[
]

Xiang Yundong has a gentle face but with a pair of ruthless eyes. He wears a blood red robe.

History
[
]

He took Wang Lin to 
Planet Dong Lin
 and allowed him to be deceived by the 
Xiang Family
 ancestor to have almost all of his life force sucked away without even reviving 
Li MuWan
.
